title: Present Simple - Hozirgi oddiy zamon
rule: Present Simple hozirgi zamonda odatiy, takrorlanuvchi harakatlar va faktlarni ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.

examples.english: I work every day.
The sun rises in the east.
She teaches English.
They don't eat meat.
Do you speak Russian?

title: Present Continuous - Hozirgi davomli zamon
rule: Hozir sodir bo'layotgan yoki shu davr ichida davom etayotgan harakatni ifodalaydi.

examples.english: I am reading a book now.
She is living in Tashkent this year.
They are coming tomorrow.
We are not working today.
Are you listening to me?

common_mistakes.note: State verbs (know, like, want) odatda Continuous'da ishlatilmaydi

title: Past Simple - O'tmish oddiy zamon
rule: O'tmishda tugallangan harakatlarni ifodalash uchun ishlatiladi.

examples.english: I visited my grandmother yesterday.
She worked in a bank for 5 years.
We went to the cinema last week.
He didn't come to the party.
Did you see that movie?

title: Future Simple (Will) - Kelajak oddiy zamon
rule: Kelajakdagi harakatlar, qarorlar va bashoratlar uchun ishlatiladi.

examples.english: I will help you with your homework.
examples.uzbek: Men sizga uy vazifangizda yordam beraman.

examples.english: It will rain tomorrow.
She won't be late.
Will you marry me?
I think they will win.

title: Articles (A/An/The) - Maqolalar
rule: A/An - noaniq artikel (birinchi marta), The - aniq artikel (ma'lum narsa).
structure: a + consonant, an + vowel, the + aniq narsa

examples.english: I have a car. The car is red.
examples.uzbek: Mening mashinam bor. Mashina qizil rangda.

examples.english: She is an engineer.
The sun is hot.
I love music.
An apple a day keeps the doctor away.

title: Present Perfect - Hozirgi tugallangan zamon
rule: O'tmishda boshlanib hozirga qadar bog'liq bo'lgan yoki yaqinda tugagan harakatlar.

examples.english: I have finished my homework.
She has lived here for 10 years.
Have you ever been to London?
They have not seen this movie yet.
I have just arrived.

common_mistakes.note: Aniq o'tmish vaqt bilan Past Simple

title: Past Continuous - O'tmish davomli zamon
rule: O'tmishda ma'lum vaqtda davom etayotgan harakatni ifodalaydi.
usage: O'tmishda aniq vaqtda davom etgan harakat
Boshqa harakat yuzaga kelganda fonlikdagi harakat

examples.english: I was reading when she called.
examples.uzbek: U qo'ng'iroq qilganida men kitob o'qiyotgan edim.

examples.english: They were playing football at 5 PM.
While I was cooking, he was watching TV.
examples.uzbek: Men ovqat pishirayotganimda, u televizor ko'rayotgan edi.

examples.english: It was raining all day yesterday.
examples.uzbek: Kecha kun bo'yi yomg'ir yog'ayotgan edi.

examples.english: Were you sleeping when I arrived?

common_mistakes.wrong: When I came, he watched TV
common_mistakes.correct: When I came, he was watching TV

title: Modal Verbs - Modal fe'llar
rule: Can, could, may, might, must, should, would - imkoniyat, ruxsat, keraklilik, maslahat ifodalash.

examples.english: I can speak three languages.
You should see a doctor.
It might rain tomorrow.
You must wear a seatbelt.
Could you help me, please?

title: First Conditional - Birinchi shartli gap
rule: Haqiqiy yoki ehtimoli yuqori bo'lgan kelajak sharti va natijasi.
structure: If + Present Simple, will + base verb

examples.english: If it rains, I will stay home.
examples.uzbek: Agar yomg'ir yog'sa, men uyda qolaman.

examples.english: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
I will call you if I have time.
If she doesn't hurry, she will miss the train.
What will you do if you win the lottery?
examples.uzbek: Agar lotereyada yutib olsangiz, nima qilasiz?

common_mistakes.wrong: If it will rain, I stay home
common_mistakes.correct: If it rains, I will stay home

common_mistakes.wrong: If you will come, I am happy
common_mistakes.correct: If you come, I will be happy

title: Passive Voice - Noaniq nisbat
rule: Harakat bajarilishiga e'tibor qaratiladi, bajaruvchiga emas.

examples.english: The book was written by Tolstoy.
English is spoken all over the world.
The house is being built now.
The room has been cleaned.
My car was stolen last night.

title: Reported Speech - O'zlashtirma gap
rule: Kimningdir so'zlarini boshqacha ifodalash. Zamon va zamonlar orqaga siljiydi.

examples.english: She said, 'I am tired.' → She said (that) she was tired.
examples.uzbek: U 'Men charchadim' dedi → U charchagan ekanligini aytdi.

examples.english: He asked me where I lived.
examples.note: Savol - so'roq so'zdan keyin to'g'ri tartib

examples.english: She told me to close the door.
'I have finished,' he said → He said he had finished.
They said they would come the next day.
examples.note: Will → Would, tomorrow → the next day

common_mistakes.wrong: She asked me where do I live
common_mistakes.correct: She asked me where I lived

common_mistakes.wrong: He said that he is busy
common_mistakes.correct: He said that he was busy

title: Perfect Continuous Tenses - Tugallangan davomli zamonlar
usage: Present Perfect Continuous: hozirga qadar davom etgan
Past Perfect Continuous: o'tmishda boshqa voqeagacha

examples.english: I have been studying English for 5 years.
examples.uzbek: Men 5 yildan beri ingliz tilini o'rganib kelyapman.

examples.english: She had been waiting for an hour when he arrived.
examples.uzbek: U kelganida u bir soatdan beri kutayotgan edi.

examples.english: They have been living in Tokyo since 2010.
You look exhausted. Have you been running?
I had been working there for two years before I quit.
examples.uzbek: Men ishdan boshdan oldin u yerda ikki yil ishlagan edim.

common_mistakes.wrong: I have been know him for years
common_mistakes.correct: I have known him for years

common_mistakes.wrong: She has been go to school
common_mistakes.correct: She has been going to school

common_mistakes.wrong: How long you have been waiting?
common_mistakes.correct: How long have you been waiting?

title: Inversion - Inversiya (Teskari tartib)
rule: Uslubiy ta'sir uchun yoki negativ/limiting so'zlardan keyin fe'l va ega o'rin almashadi.

examples.english: Never have I seen such beauty.
Only then did I understand the problem.
Not only did she pass, but she also got the highest score.
examples.uzbek: U nafaqat o'tdi, balki eng yuqori ball oldi.

examples.english: Rarely do we see such dedication.
Had I known, I would have come earlier.
examples.note: Shart gapi - 'If I had known' o'rniga

title: Advanced Relative Clauses - Murakkab bog'lovchi gaplar
rule: Who, which, that, where, when, whose - batafsil ma'lumot beruvchi gaplar.
structure: Main clause + Relative pronoun + relative clause

examples.english: The book that I read was fascinating.
examples.uzbek: Men o'qigan kitob juda qiziqarli edi.

examples.english: My sister, who lives in London, is a doctor.
The man whose car was stolen called the police.
examples.uzbek: Mashinasi o'g'irlangan odam politsiyaga qo'ng'iroq qildi.

examples.english: This is the house where I was born.
I remember the day when we first met.

title: Mixed Conditionals - Aralash shartli gaplar
rule: O'tmish shart va hozirgi natija, yoki hozirgi shart va o'tmish natija.
structure: If + Past Perfect, would + base (yoki aksi)

examples.english: If I had studied harder, I would be successful now.
examples.uzbek: Agar ko'proq o'qiganimda, hozir muvaffaqiyatli bo'lardim.

examples.english: If I were taller, I would have become a basketball player.
examples.uzbek: Agar balandroq bo'lganimda, basketbolchi bo'lgan bo'lardim.

examples.english: If she had listened to me, she wouldn't be in trouble now.
examples.uzbek: Agar u meni tinglagan bo'lsa, hozir muammoda bo'lmasdi.

examples.english: If I knew his address, I would have visited him yesterday.
examples.uzbek: Agar manzilini bilganimda, kecha unga borgan bo'lardim.

common_mistakes.wrong: If I studied, I would be rich
common_mistakes.correct: If I had studied, I would be rich now

common_mistakes.wrong: If I was rich, I would have bought
common_mistakes.correct: If I were rich, I would have bought

title: Subjunctive Mood - Shart mayl
rule: Talab, taklif,  zaruriyat natijasidagi tavsiyani ifodalash uchun.
structure: Subject + suggest/insist/demand + that + subject + base verb

examples.english: I suggest that he study harder.
examples.uzbek: Men unga qattiqroq o'qishni taklif qilaman.

examples.english: It is essential that she be present.
I wish I were taller.
The doctor recommended that he quit smoking.
examples.uzbek: Shifokor unga chekishni tashlashni tavsiya qildi.

examples.english: If I were you, I would apologize.
examples.uzbek: Agar men siz bo'lsam, uzr so'rardim.

common_mistakes.wrong: It's important that she is here
common_mistakes.correct: It's important that she be here
